Notes: Atmospheric Infrared Sounder (AIRS) on NASA Aqua satellite. Product: AIRS3STM v7.0. Provides mid-tropospheric CO2 on a 1°×1° global grid. Requires free NASA Earthdata account. Script queries CMR API, downloads HDF/NetCDF4 granules, and extracts nearest grid cell per Nigerian state capital.

Orbiting Carbon Observatory-2 (OCO-2). Product: OCO2_L2_Lite_FP v10r. Highest-quality column-averaged XCO2 retrievals. Requires free NASA Earthdata account. Script filters quality_flag==0, spatially averages observations within 0.75° of each state capital, and caches HDF5 granules locally.
NASA POWER T2M (2m temperature). Script requests daily or monthly point endpoint and aggregates to monthly.
Precipitation (PRECTOTCORR) corrected variable; daily values are summed/aggregated to monthly totals in the script.
Relative humidity at 2m (RH2M). Aggregated to monthly means by the script.

Harmonized subnational crop statistics for Africa from HarvestStat-Africa (v1.1), compiled from FEWS NET, FAOSTAT, and national agencies. Data include area (ha), production (mt), and yield (mt/ha) with QC flags. Nigeria data available at admin-1 level. Download from public/ directory of the GitHub repository.

ESA Climate Change Initiative (CCI) Soil Moisture project. Provides global surface soil moisture (SSM) at 0.25° resolution, daily and monthly. Combines active and passive microwave sensors. Data available in NetCDF format. No authentication required. Download via FTP or CEDA Archive. Script extracts SSM for Nigerian state centroids and aggregates as needed.
Simple elevation lookup (meters) used to supplement soil profiles. No authentication required.
